summary: Strong bash conventions (shebang, set -euo pipefail, quoted vars, error handling) and clean workflow structure with pinned action refs and proper permissions. Critical issues: (1) Regex patterns duplicated in bump-version.sh lines 90–96 and 127–131 (breaking_type, breaking_body, feat_type, fix_type should be constants at top); (2) JSON version parsing fragile—sed regex fails if 'version' appears elsewhere; (3) Workflow output capture indirect—echoes bash variables to stdout hoping act captures them, brittle. (4) run-tests.sh git repo setup is sound but assumes fixture files exist without validation. Missing shown test files prevent TDD verification (acknowledged in eval scope: NO test files). Fix duplication and make output verification explicit (e.g., write results to structured file) before shipping.
